name: philiprehberger/webhook-relay-client
description: Webhook Relay accepts events from your application and fans them out to subscriber endpoints with HMAC signing, idempotency-key dedup, exponential-backoff retries, dead-letter handling, and per-attempt observability.  This spec is the source of truth for the API. Controllers conform to it; SDKs are generated from it. Run `npx @stoplight/spectral-cli lint openapi/spec.yaml` to validate locally.
